description.en: Return the path to an executable which would be run if the given cmd was called. If no cmd would be called, return None. mode is a permission mask passed to os.access(), by default determining if the file exists and is executable. path is a “PATH string” specifying the directories to look in, delimited by os.pathsep. When no path is specified, the PATH environment variable is read from os.environ, falling back to os.defpath if it is not set. If cmd contains a directory component, which() only...
